title: Wan 3.0 Launches Multi-Model AI Video Generation Platform
description: Wan 3.0 (https://www.wan3ai.app) today announced the launch of its AI-powered video generation platform that transforms text descriptions and reference images into high-quality video clips through a multi-model engine directly in the browser. The platform is now available with flexible pricing

title: Netflix reportedly building an AI animation studio called INKubator for future animated content
description: According to The Verge, Netflix is reportedly expanding its use of generative AI with a new internal animation studio called “INKubator” . Recent reports and online job listings suggest that the company is quietly building a dedicated AI-focused animation team aimed at producing short-form animated content for the platform.

title: Coworks Releases Guide to Help Coworking Operators Analyze Business Performance Using AI
description: RALEIGH, N.C. -- Coworks, a coworking space management software platform, today published a practical guide showing coworking operators how to use AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Google Gemini to analyze their space performance data without technical expertise. The guide addresses

title: Stellagent Launches Agentic Commerce Studio for AI Agent Shopping Readiness
description: New browser-based validation environment helps merchants, payment service providers and commerce platforms test agent-led product discovery, checkout preparation and emerging protocol readiness. Stellagent Inc., an AI commerce infrastructure company based in Japan, announced the launch of Agentic Commerce Studio, a browser-based playground and validation environment that helps merchants, payment service providers and commerce platforms prepare [...] The post Stellagent Launches Agentic Commerce Studio for AI Agent Shopping Readiness appeared first on SalesTech Star .
